subject: READY: 8 new US events + 19 venues — from posts scanner (new capability)
body:
Porter,

8 new US events ready to load, all from cities that previously had ZERO events. These came from a new 'Stage 0.5' — scanning group feeds for shared event links (not /events/ tab).

Load order:
1. Venues first: 19 new venues need loading (have geocodes, no calendar_venue_id_test)
2. Events: 8 non-CLASS events with venue_id and valid US geocodes

The events:
- Somerville MA: MARIA OLIVERA Workshops (Apr 11)
- Roswell GA: Tango Lounge ROUGE (Apr 12, May 9)
- Atlanta GA: Milonga del Toro (Apr 12)
- Cambridge MA: MIT Spring Milonga (Apr 23)
- Austin TX: Tomas Corbalan Practica (Apr 28)
- Vestavia Hills AL: CLINT AND SHELLEY Milonga (May 9)
- Austin TX: LOS DUDES BIRTHDAY MILONGA (May 24)

IMPORTANT: Some events in SQLite have bad geocodes (European cities mis-tagged as US). Only load events where:
- state is a real 2-letter US state code
- lat between 24-50, lng between -125 and -65
- city is NOT Amsterdam, Athens, Berlin, Barcelona, etc.

The 110 CLASS events are outreach-only per pipeline rules — don't load those.

Your existing load-from-booker.ts should handle these — same SQLite, same schema. The events have hosts_json populated if you want to set discoveredOrganizerName.

— Booker
